title: Ad Astra: Ashes of Luyten
description: Adds new planets to the Ad Astra mod
body:
**Ashes of Luyten** is an addon for the popular mod [**Ad Astra**](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra), adding a new star system — Luyten. The mod adds three unique planets to the Luyten system.

![gj273b](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45d1e4b6dd64c435a951c961500f4d470cb8d8a2.jpeg)

---

### **What awaits you**

GJ 273 c — Fire Wasteland


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![gj273c](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31c62a482635f7c4e03f87d1b222988a047c0ef5.jpeg)

</details>


GJ 273 b — Early World

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![gj273b](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c9037ed5c749a9cab8b9672820b98e6fe0859ec3.jpeg)

</details>

GJ 273 d — Water World

<details>

  <summary>Spoiler</summary>


![gj273d](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/58834b98e21d7651585c813b05313ca27099ffba.jpeg)

</details>


In the depths of GJ 273 d, you will find ruined alien structures with new items:
_Luyten Crystals_ and _Luyten Scrap_ — from these, you can create new items and new recipes.


---

### **A new chapter in the Astrodux book**
A short story about the new system is written in the book. The book also describes the main items from the addon and how to obtain them. 
 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Requires Patchouli for the in-game guide book

![A new chapter in the Astrodux book](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4a40327b2db04283c1daa7c0428ba38855782d2.webp)



</details>


---

### How to get to the system?

You just need to build a Tier 4 rocket from the Ad Astra mod. Explore all three planets. At the moment, only GJ 273 c and GJ 273 d have dungeons. GJ 273 d contains an alien structure where you can currently find all the essential items. GJ 273 b does not have any dungeons yet.




---

### **What's next? (Roadmap)**

- New mobs (hostile and peaceful)
- Special abilities for tools
- New dungeons and rooms in complexes
- Continuation of the storyline
- Unique biomes for planets


---

### What is the goal of the project?

The addon is primarily focused on and will strive toward adventure and exploration. Many things in the addon cannot be crafted — you must find them.


---

### Languages

Ashes of Luyten is fully translated into 22 languages. 

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

(English, Русский, Українська, 한국어, Polski, 中文, 日本語, Français, Deutsch, Español, Português (Brasil), Italiano, Türkçe, Nederlands, Čeština, Tiếng Việt, ภาษาไทย, Bahasa Indonesia, العربية, हिन्दी, Ελληνικά, Română.)


</details>


---

### AI and MCreator

Were used in certain parts of the mod.
